Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Huh? There are white spots on the leaves here...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 6 25 25}I think I've seen something like this in a book at the library. It might be a common disease in vegetables and flowers.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 4 21 6 11}Wh-What do we do, {f 4 1}-kun!? What if the plants die...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SEL_011_0_0
Dialog.Option: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}How did the book say to fix it?

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 6 25 25}Y-Yes, you're right. This is exactly what I did all that reading for...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}From what I can tell, it doesn't look too serious yet. If we take care of it now, it should be all right.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 4 25 25}Wha— Oh, right! If we take care of it now, it might not be a problem.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}From what I can tell, it doesn't look too serious yet. Um, what did the book say...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}The book said if you take care of it right away, they'll get better![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}We just need to cut off the white parts, and... That's right, vinegar![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}It said to put some diluted vinegar on the affected areas. I'll go get some from downstairs![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I tended the rooftop planters with Fuuka...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 6 25 25}...I think that's about everything we can do.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}We've picked up the fallen leaves, and the air circulation is good now too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}{f 4 22 0 6 49 25 21}Everything should be fine now. All that's left is to trust they can recover...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Thanks to the care we put in, it[n]looks like this will be a big harvest.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}I wouldn't have been able to save the plants if you hadn't been here.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}{f 4 22 0 6 24 25 21}I'm still a little worried, but... please let me help out again sometime.[n]{f 1 1}
